revision.text:
[[ar:إيماغاوا]][[ca:Clan Imagawa]][[cs:Klan Imagawa]][[de:Imagawa (Klan)]][[en:Imagawa clan]][[eo:Imagawa (klano)]][[es:Clan Imagawa]][[eu:Imagawa klana]][[fa:خاندان ایماگاوا]][[fr:Clan Imagawa]][[glk:ايماگاوا كوگا]][[it:Clan Imagawa]][[ja:今川氏]][[ko:이마가와씨]][[pl:Klan Imagawa]][[pt:Clã Imagawa]][[ru:Имагава (род)]][[sk:Klan Imagawa]][[th:ตระกูลอิมางาวะ]][[tr:Imagawa boyu]][[uk:Рід Імаґава]][[vi:Gia tộc Imagawa]][[zh:今川氏]] {{Short description|Japanese samurai clan}} {{family name hatnote|Imagawa|lang=Japanese}} {{Infobox Japanese clan |surname = Imagawa |surname nihongo = 今川 |image = Japanese crest Imagawa Akadori.svg |image size = 150px |image caption = The emblem ([[:en:Mon (badge)|''mon'']]) of the Imagawa clan |home province = {{ill|Suruga Province|en|Suruga Province|qid=Q864170|lt=Suruga|1=Suruga Province}}
{{ill|Tōtōmi Province|en|Tōtōmi Province|qid=Q1048864|lt=Tōtōmi|1=Tōtōmi Province}}
{{ill|Mikawa Province|en|Mikawa Province|qid=Q768158|lt=Mikawa|1=Mikawa Province}} |parent house = [[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|20px]] {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}} |titles = Various |founder = [[Imagawa Kuniuji]] (Ashikaga Kuniuji) |final ruler = |current head = |founding year = 13th century |dissolution = |ruled until = |cadet branches = Horikoshi clan
Sena clan }} {{nihongo|'''Imagawa clan'''|今川氏|Imagawa-uji|lead=yes}} was a {{ill|Japanese people|en|Japanese people|qid=Q161652|lt=Japanese|1=Japanese people}} {{ill|Samurai|en|Samurai|qid=Q38142|lt=Samurai|1=Samurai}} [[Japanese clans|clan]] that claimed descent from the {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}} by way of the {{ill|Kawachi Genji|en|Kawachi Genji|qid=Q5360652|lt=Kawachi Genji|1=Kawachi Genji}}. It was a branch of the [[Minamoto clan]] by the {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}}. ==Origins== [[File:Imagawahassho.jpg|thumb|Monument of the birthplace of Imagawa clan（[[:en:Nishio, Aichi|Nishio]], {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}）]] [[Ashikaga Kuniuji]], grandson of [[Ashikaga Yoshiuji]], established himself in the 13th century at Imagawa ({{ill|Mikawa Province|en|Mikawa Province|qid=Q768158|lt=Mikawa Province|1=Mikawa Province}}) and took its name. Imagawa Norikuni (1295–1384) received the provinces of Tōtōmi, and later Suruga, from his cousin Shōgun {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|qid=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji}} ==Located at== Ounami no Kori, Mikawa (modern day [[:en:Nishio, Aichi|Nishio, Aichi]]) mainly {{ill|Suruga Province|en|Suruga Province|qid=Q864170|lt=Suruga Province|1=Suruga Province}} and {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|en|Tōtōmi Province|qid=Q1048864|lt=Tōtōmi Province|1=Tōtōmi Province}} during the Warring States period ==Crests== *Two hikiryou *Yoshimoto's version of the akaitori (pictured) *Two hikiryou and a paulownia planted in white soil ==Major figures== *{{ill|Imagawa Sadayo|en|Imagawa Sadayo|qid=Q281350|lt=Imagawa Sadayo|1=Imagawa Sadayo}} *{{ill|Imagawa Yoshitada|en|Imagawa Yoshitada|qid=Q3572692|lt=Imagawa Yoshitada|1=Imagawa Yoshitada}} *{{ill|Imagawa Ujichika|en|Imagawa Ujichika|qid=Q909023|lt=Imagawa Ujichika|1=Imagawa Ujichika}} *{{ill|Imagawa Ujiteru|en|Imagawa Ujiteru|qid=Q8189863|lt=Imagawa Ujiteru|1=Imagawa Ujiteru}} *{{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|en|Imagawa Yoshimoto|qid=Q1054305|lt=Imagawa Yoshimoto|1=Imagawa Yoshimoto}} *{{ill|Imagawa Ujizane|en|Imagawa Ujizane|qid=Q3100078|lt=Imagawa Ujizane|1=Imagawa Ujizane}} ==Muromachi era== *{{ill|Imagawa Sadayo|en|Imagawa Sadayo|qid=Q281350|lt=Imagawa Sadayo|1=Imagawa Sadayo}}, was a renowned Japanese poet and military commander who served as {{ill|tandai|en|tandai|qid=Q1068009|lt=tandai|1=Tandai}} ("constable") of [[Kyushu|Kyūshū]] under the {{ill|Ashikaga shogunate|en|Ashikaga shogunate|qid=Q1154406|lt=Ashikaga bakufu|1=Ashikaga shogunate}} from 1371 to 1395. ==Sengoku era== During the {{ill|Sengoku period|en|Sengoku period|qid=Q204023|lt=Sengoku period|1=Sengoku period}} in the 1540s and 1550s, Yoshimoto Imagawa attempted to establish his clan as the strongest in eastern Japan. However, after the death of Yoshimoto at the {{ill|Battle of Okehazama|en|Battle of Okehazama|qid=Q349422|lt=Battle of Okehazama|1=Battle of Okehazama}} in 1560, many Imagawa officers defected to other clans. Once a powerful clan. Within a decade, the clan had lost its entire land holdings to the [[Tokugawa clan|Tokugawa]] and [[Takeda clan|Takeda]] clans. The Imagawa subsequently became {{ill|Kōke|en|Kōke|qid=Q11669183|lt=masters of ceremonies|1=Kōke}} in the service of the Tokugawa clan.{{in lang|ja}} [http://www2.harimaya.com/sengoku/html/imaga_k.html "Suruga Imagawa-shi" on Harimaya.com] (12 July 2008) ==Clan castles== Separated by province name. * {{ill|Suruga Province|en|Suruga Province|qid=Q864170|lt=Suruga Province|1=Suruga Province}}: Imagawa Kan (later known as {{ill|Sunpu Castle|en|Sunpu Castle|qid=Q1038629|lt=Sunpu Castle|1=Sunpu Castle}}), [[Shizuhatayama Castle]], [[Mochifune Castle]], {{ill|Tanaka Castle|en|Tanaka Castle|qid=Q2970753|lt=Tanaka Castle|1=Tanaka Castle}} * {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|en|Tōtōmi Province|qid=Q1048864|lt=Tōtōmi Province|1=Tōtōmi Province}}: {{ill|Kakegawa Castle|en|Kakegawa Castle|qid=Q2969457|lt=Kakegawa Castle|1=Kakegawa Castle}}, Takatenjin Castle ([[:ja:高天神城|ja]]), {{ill|Futamata Castle|en|Futamata Castle|qid=Q11371339|lt=Futamata Castle|1=Futamata Castle}}, [[Inui Castle]], {{ill|Hamamatsu Castle|en|Hamamatsu Castle|qid=Q1152352|lt=Hamamatsu Castle|1=Hamamatsu Castle}}, [[Utsuyama Castle]]. * {{ill|Mikawa Province|en|Mikawa Province|qid=Q768158|lt=Mikawa Province|1=Mikawa Province}}: [[:en:Yoshida Castle|Yoshida Castle]], {{ill|Tahara Castle|en|Tahara Castle|qid=Q10856432|lt=Tahara Castle|1=Tahara Castle}}, {{ill|Okazaki Castle|en|Okazaki Castle|qid=Q1013445|lt=Okazaki Castle|1=Okazaki Castle}}, {{ill|Anjō|en|Anjō|qid=Q270806|lt=Anjō Castle|1=Anjō}} * {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|qid=Q514506|lt=Owari Province|1=Owari Province}}: [[Katsukake Castle]], {{ill|Ōdaka Castle|en|Ōdaka Castle|qid=Q11441955|lt=Ōdaka Castle|1=Ōdaka Castle}}, [[Narumi Castle]] ==Edo period== *{{ill|Shinagawa Takahisa|en|Shinagawa Takahisa|qid=Q3387863|lt=Shinagawa Takahisa|1=Shinagawa Takahisa}}, the son of {{ill|Imagawa Ujizane|en|Imagawa Ujizane|qid=Q3100078|lt=Imagawa Ujizane|1=Imagawa Ujizane}}. He was a {{ill|Hatamoto|en|Hatamoto|qid=Q572662|lt=Hatamoto|1=Hatamoto}} and served the [[Tokugawa clan]]. *{{ill|Imagawa Norinobu|en|Imagawa Norinobu|qid=Q6002042|lt=Imagawa Norinobu|1=Imagawa Norinobu}}, an Imagawa of the late Edo period, was a ''{{ill|Wakadoshiyori|en|Wakadoshiyori|qid=Q1036547|lt=Wakadoshiyori|1=Wakadoshiyori}}'' in the Tokugawa administration. ==Key genealogies== {{Tree chart/start}} {{Tree chart| | | | | | | | | | | | | | sei | |sei={{ill|Emperor Seiwa|en|Emperor Seiwa|qid=Q349243|lt=Emperor Seiwa|1=Emperor Seiwa}}}} {{Tree chart| | | | | | | | | | | | | | |:| |}} {{Tree chart| | | | | | | | | | | | | | yri|yri=[[Minamoto no Yoriyoshi]]}} {{Tree chart| | | | | | |,|-|-|-|-|-|-|-|^|-|-|-|-|-|-|.|}} {{Tree chart| | | | | | man | | | | | | | | | | | | | sub |man={{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|en|Minamoto no Yoshiie|qid=Q32613|lt="Hachimantaro" Yoshiie|1=Minamoto no Yoshiie}}|sub={{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|en|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|qid=Q3083118|lt="Shinra Saburō" Yoshimitsu|1=Minamoto no Yoshimitsu}}}} {{Tree chart| | |,|-|-|-|^|-|-|-|-|.| | | | | | | |,|-|^|-|.|}} {{chart|border=0|boxstyle=background:#dfd;| | |!| | | | | | | | |!| | | | | | | |!| | | kai| | | ||kai=[[Takeda clan]]}} {{Tree chart| | cka | | | | | | | kni | | | | | | nri | | tke | |kni={{ill|Minamoto no Yoshikuni|en|Minamoto no Yoshikuni|qid=Q3314719|lt=Minamoto no Yoshikuni|1=Minamoto no Yoshikuni}}|cka=Minamoto no Yoshichika|nri=Minamoto no Yoshinari|tke={{ill|Minamoto no Yoshikiyo|en|Minamoto no Yoshikiyo|qid=Q6863154|lt=Takeda Yoshikiyo|1=Minamoto no Yoshikiyo}}}} {{Tree chart| | |!| | | | |,|-|-|-|^|-|-|-|.| | | |!| | | |:| | |}} {{chart|border=0|boxstyle=background:#dfd;| | |!| | | | aga | | | | | | nit| | sat | |aga={{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}}|nit={{ill|Nitta clan|en|Nitta clan|qid=Q2274150|lt=Nitta clan|1=Nitta clan}}|sat={{ill|Satake clan|en|Satake clan|qid=Q2975363|lt=Satake clan|1=Satake clan}}}} {{Tree chart| | tme | | | ysu | | | | | | nit | | sat |ysu={{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiyasu|en|Minamoto no Yoshiyasu|qid=Q6863161|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiyasu|1=Minamoto no Yoshiyasu}}|nit={{ill|Minamoto no Yoshishige|en|Minamoto no Yoshishige|qid=Q732097|lt=Nitta Yoshishige|1=Minamoto no Yoshishige}}|tme={{ill|Minamoto no Tameyoshi|en|Minamoto no Tameyoshi|qid=Q1381638|lt=Minamoto no Tameyoshi|1=Minamoto no Tameyoshi}}|sat={{ill|Satake Masayoshi|en|Satake Masayoshi|qid=Q3473845|lt=Satake Masayoshi|1=Satake Masayoshi}}}} {{Tree chart| | |!| | | | |!| | | | | | | |:| | | |:|}} {{Tree chart| | ysi | | | kne | | | | | | |:| | |kne={{ill|Ashikaga Yoshikane|en|Ashikaga Yoshikane|qid=Q2087778|lt=Ashikaga Yoshikane|1=Ashikaga Yoshikane}}|ysi={{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitomo|en|Minamoto no Yoshitomo|qid=Q532301|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}}} {{Tree chart| | |!| | | | |!| | | | | | | |:| |}} {{Tree chart| | yri | | | yji | | | | | | |:| | | | |yri='''''{{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura|1=Kamakura shogunate}} {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shogun|1=Shogun}}'''''
[[Minamoto no Yoritomo]]|yji=Ashikaga Yoshiuji}} {{Tree chart| | |,|-|-|-|-|^|-|-|.| | | | |:| | }} {{chart|border=0|boxstyle=background:#dfd;| | |!| | | | | | | kir | | | |:| | | | |kir={{ill|Kira clan|en|Kira clan|qid=Q2686025|lt=Kira clan|1=Kira clan}}}} {{Tree chart| | yas | | | | | | osa | | | |:| |yas=Ashikaga Yasuuji|osa=Kira Osauji}} {{Tree chart| | |!| | | | |,|-|-|^|-|-|.| |:| }} {{chart|border=0|boxstyle=background:#dfd;| | |!| | | | |!| | | | | ima |:| | | | | | | ima='''Imagawa clan'''}} {{Tree chart| | yri | | | mit | | | | kni |:| |kni=Imagawa Kuniuji|mit=Kira Mitsuji|yri=Ashikaga Yoriuji}} {{Tree chart| | |!| | | | |:| | | | | |:| |:| }} {{Tree chart| | iet | | | | | | | | | | | |:| |iet=Ashikaga Ietoki}} {{Tree chart| | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |:| |}} {{Tree chart| | sda | | | | | | | | | | | |:| |sda=Ashikaga Sadauji}} {{Tree chart| | |!| | | | | | | | | | | | |:| |}} {{Tree chart| | tka | | | | | | | | | | | nit | |tka='''''{{ill|Ashikaga shogunate|en|Ashikaga shogunate|qid=Q1154406|lt=Muromachi|1=Ashikaga shogunate}} {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shogun|1=Shogun}}'''''
{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|qid=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji}}|nit=[[Nitta Yoshisada]]}} {{Tree chart/end}} '''Suruga''' {{col-start}} {{col-3}} #[[Imagawa Kuniuji]] (1243–1282) #[[Imagawa Morouji ]](1261–1323) #[[Imagawa Norikuni]] (1295?-1384) #[[Imagawa Noriuji]] (1316–1365) #[[Imagawa Yasunori]] (1334?-1409?) #[[Imagawa Norimasa]] (1364–1433) #[[Imagawa Noritada]] (1408-1461?) #{{ill|Imagawa Yoshitada|en|Imagawa Yoshitada|qid=Q3572692|lt=Imagawa Yoshitada|1=Imagawa Yoshitada}} #{{ill|Imagawa Ujichika|en|Imagawa Ujichika|qid=Q909023|lt=Imagawa Ujichika|1=Imagawa Ujichika}} #{{ill|Imagawa Ujiteru|en|Imagawa Ujiteru|qid=Q8189863|lt=Imagawa Ujiteru|1=Imagawa Ujiteru}} #{{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|en|Imagawa Yoshimoto|qid=Q1054305|lt=Imagawa Yoshimoto|1=Imagawa Yoshimoto}} #{{ill|Imagawa Ujizane|en|Imagawa Ujizane|qid=Q3100078|lt=Imagawa Ujizane|1=Imagawa Ujizane}} #[[Imagawa Naofusa]] (1594–1662) #[[Imagawa Ujinari]] (1642–1673) #[[Imagawa Ujimichi]] (1668–1699) #[[Imagawa Noritaka]] (1694–1712) #[[Imagawa Norinushi]] (1698–1728) #[[Imagawa Norihiko]] (1716–1749) #[[Imagawa Noriyasu]] (1731–1784) #[[Imagawa Yoshiaki]] (1756–1818) #[[Imagawa Yoshimochi]] (1786–1839) #[[Imagawa Yoshiyori]] (1810–1841) #{{ill|Imagawa Norinobu|en|Imagawa Norinobu|qid=Q6002042|lt=Imagawa Norinobu|1=Imagawa Norinobu}} #[[Imagawa Yoshihito]] (1854-1872) {{col-3}} {{col-end}} '''Tōtōmi''' {{col-start}} {{col-3}} *{{ill|Imagawa Sadayo|en|Imagawa Sadayo|qid=Q281350|lt=Imagawa Sadayo|1=Imagawa Sadayo}} (1326-1420?) *[[Imagawa Nakaaki]] *[[Imagawa Sadaomi]] *[[Imagawa Sadasuke]] *[[Imagawa Norimasa]] (?-1464) {{col-3}} *[[Imagawa Sadanobu]] (?-1474) {{col-3}} {{col-end}} '''Tōtōmi (Horikoshi branch)''' {{col-start}} {{col-3}} *[[Horikoshi Sadamoto]] (?-1537) *[[Horikoshi Ujinobu]] *[[Horikoshi Sadatada]] *[[Horikoshi Sadahisa]] *[[Horikoshi Sadayoshi]] {{col-3}} *[[Horikoshi Sadatsugu]] {{col-3}} {{col-end}} '''Tōtōmi (Sena branch)''' {{col-start}} {{col-3}} *[[Sena Kazuhide]] *[[Sena Ujisada]] *[[Sena Ujitoshi]] *[[Sena Ujiakira]] *[[Sena Masakatsu]] {{col-3}} *[[Sena Kiyosada]] {{col-3}} {{col-end}} == Notable members == * {{ill|Jukei-ni|en|Jukei-ni|qid=Q10931686|lt=Jukei-ni|1=Jukei-ni}} * {{ill|Lady Tsukiyama|en|Lady Tsukiyama|qid=Q4415657|lt=Lady Tsukiyama|1=Lady Tsukiyama}} * {{ill|Lady Hayakawa|en|Lady Hayakawa|qid=Q11511331|lt=Lady Hayakawa|1=Lady Hayakawa}} ==Notable retainers== {{div col|colwidth=20em}} *{{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Matsudaira Motoyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} *{{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} *{{ill|Okabe Motonobu|en|Okabe Motonobu|qid=Q1073455|lt=Okabe Motonobu|1=Okabe Motonobu}} *{{ill|Matsui Munenobu|en|Matsui Munenobu|qid=Q6788099|lt=Matsui Munenobu|1=Matsui Munenobu}} *{{ill|Udono Nagateru|en|Udono Nagateru|qid=Q4352873|lt=Udono Nagateru|1=Udono Nagateru}} *[[Asahina Yasutomo]] *{{ill|Ii Naomori|en|Ii Naomori|qid=Q3208778|lt=Ii Naomori|1=Ii Naomori}} *{{ill|Abe Motozane|en|Abe Motozane|qid=Q4666432|lt=Abe Motozane|1=Abe Motozane}} *{{ill|Ichinomiya Munekore|en|Ichinomiya Munekore|qid=Q5986254|lt=Ichinomiya Munekore|1=Ichinomiya Munekore}} *{{ill|Ii Naochika|en|Ii Naochika|qid=Q5994890|lt=Ii Naochika|1=Ii Naochika}} *{{ill|Ii Naotora|en|Ii Naotora|qid=Q11161448|lt=Ii Naotora|1=Ii Naotora}} *[[:en:Iio Tsuratatsu|Iio Tsuratatsu]] *{{ill|Otazu no kata|en|Otazu no kata|qid=Q28785314|lt=Otazu no kata|1=Otazu no kata}} *{{ill|Katsurayama Ujimoto|en|Katsurayama Ujimoto|qid=Q6378191|lt=Katsurayama Ujimoto|1=Katsurayama Ujimoto}} *[[:en:Sessai Choro|Taigen Sessai]] *{{ill|Iio Noritsura|en|Iio Noritsura|qid=Q3148372|lt=Iio Noritsura|1=Iio Noritsura}} *[[Itami Yasunao]] *[[Yamaguchi Noritsugu]] *[[Yamaguchi Noriyoshi]] *[[Yokoe Magohachi]] *{{ill|Fuji Nobutada|en|Fuji Nobutada|qid=Q5507351|lt=Fuji Nobutada|1=Fuji Nobutada}} {{div col end}} ==Popular culture== Imagawa is a playable nation in {{ill|Europa Universalis IV|en|Europa Universalis IV|qid=Q2625075|lt=Europa Universalis IV|1=Europa Universalis IV}}. ==Notes== {{reflist}} ==References== *{{in lang|ja}} [http://www2.harimaya.com/sengoku/html/imaga_k.html "Suruga Imagawa-shi" on Harimaya.com] (12 July 2008) Imagawa]] [[glk:ايماگاوا كوگا]] [[it:Clan Imagawa]] [[ja:今川氏]] [[ko:이마가와씨]] [[pl:Klan Imagawa]] [[pt:Clã Imagawa]] [[ru:Имагава (род)]] [[sk:Klan Imagawa]] [[th:ตระกูลอิมางาวะ]] [[tr:Imagawa boyu]]
